clusters.title: Hard-coded worker log location duplicates configurable logging knowledge

member_findings.title: Hard-coded worker log location duplicates configurable logging knowledge
member_findings.impact: The new command bakes in /opt/yuanrong/datasystem/log and later constructs <address>.log, while worker startup and the logging subsystem already treat log_dir and log_filename as configurable. Future logging layout changes now need to be remembered in this CLI command as well, and the comments/spec can mislead maintainers into thinking this is the canonical worker log path.
member_findings.fix: Resolve the log directory and filename from the same worker configuration/command-line flags used by start/logging, or factor a small CLI helper that derives the active worker log path from existing worker config defaults instead of hard-coding a parallel convention.
